about.title: Our Drive – Our Expertise
about.mission_text: GreenHOMEnergy possesses bundled, cross-industry know-how. This enables us to offer our customers optimal solutions in the field of energy generation and supply.
about.why_text: Our holistic approach enables us to manage our customers' projects from planning, material procurement, to installation, and successfully complete them.

services.title: Our Services
services.planning_text: Comprehensive analysis of your energy needs and individual planning of your photovoltaic system. Our experts advise you on the optimal solutions for your company.
services.installation_text: Professional installation by certified specialists. From module assembly to commissioning - everything from a single source with the highest quality standards.
services.maintenance_text: Regular maintenance and fast service for maximum efficiency of your system. We ensure that your investment achieves optimal returns in the long term.
services.page_subtitle: Comprehensive photovoltaic solutions from project development to operational management - all from a single source.
services.b2b_planning_text: Every business is unique. Therefore, we analyze your energy needs, site characteristics, and business goals to design a customized photovoltaic system. We take care of all technical and economic aspects, from statics to yield forecasts.
services.b2b_installation_text: Our team of certified installers ensures smooth and timely implementation. We use only high-quality components from leading manufacturers to guarantee the longevity and maximum performance of your system.
services.b2b_maintenance_text: After commissioning comes optimization. We offer comprehensive maintenance contracts and proactive operational management to maximize the yield of your system. With our monitoring system, you always have an eye on your energy production.
services.mont_text: Piling work, fence construction, mechanical maintenance (for open-field systems from 3MW), trial piling.
services.rooftop_text: Optimal use of your roof areas with various mounting systems for flat roofs, pitched roofs, and sandwich/trapezoidal sheet metal. Perfectly adapted to your building structure.
services.ground_mount_text: Large-scale solar parks with optimal land use. From project development and soil surveys to the installation of the complete system.
services.carport_text: Double benefit: vehicle protection and power generation. Easy installation with user-friendly setup and optimal space utilization.
services.agri_pv_text: Innovative combination of agriculture and photovoltaics. Enables simultaneous use for farming and energy generation.
services.bess_text: Intelligent energy storage solutions for maximum self-consumption optimization and grid stability. Integration into existing and new PV systems.
services.project_dev_text: Comprehensive project development from the initial idea to realization. Feasibility studies, approval procedures, and financing concepts.
services.engineering_text: Detailed planning with state-of-the-art CAD software. Static calculations, electrical planning, and 3D visualizations for optimal system design.
services.turnkey_text: Complete implementation from a single source. From material procurement to installation, commissioning, and acceptance.
services.drone_survey_text: Precise measurement with state-of-the-art drone technology. Detailed measurements and 3D models for optimal system planning.
services.pile_driving_text: Professional piling work with our own Gayk piling machines and truck fleet. Secure foundation for open-field systems.
services.om_text: Professional operations management and maintenance for maximum system availability. 24/7 monitoring and fast service.
services.direct_marketing_text: Optimal marketing of your solar power. Power Purchase Agreements and direct marketing for maximum revenue.
services.tenant_electricity_text: Innovative tenant electricity models for commercial properties. Direct supply of tenants with affordable solar power.
services.process_subtitle: From initial consultation to long-term support
services.process_step1_text: Free initial consultation and detailed analysis of your energy needs and location.
services.process_step2_text: Detailed planning with CAD software, statics, and yield forecast for optimal system design.
services.process_step3_text: Professional installation by certified specialists and complete commissioning.
services.process_step4_text: Long-term support with regular maintenance and 24/7 monitoring for optimal yields.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.subtitle: Discover a selection of our successfully realized projects. From small commercial systems to large industrial complexes - we have successfully implemented over 100 projects.
projects.p1_text: Large-scale photovoltaic system on a production plant with 500 kWp output. The system covers 60% of the company's energy needs and saves over 200 tons of CO₂ annually.
projects.p2_text: Modern photovoltaic system on an office complex with optimal south orientation. The 150 kWp system supplies the entire building with sustainable energy and reduces electricity costs by 70%.
projects.p3_text: One of our largest projects: 750 kWp photovoltaic system on a modern logistics center. The system optimally utilizes the large roof areas and generates over 700,000 kWh of clean electricity annually.
projects.p4_text: Photovoltaic system for a mechanical engineering company with high energy demand. The 300 kWp system was specifically tuned to production times and maximizes self-consumption.
projects.p5_text: Compact but efficient photovoltaic system for a craft business. Despite limited roof area, we were able to realize a 100 kWp system that supplies 80% of the business with solar power.
projects.p6_text: Photovoltaic system on a distribution center with intelligent energy distribution. The 400 kWp system supplies both the building and the electric vehicle fleet with clean energy.
projects.cta_subtitle: Let our expertise convince you and become part of our success story. Together, we will realize your project.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Do you have questions about photovoltaic systems or would you like to receive an individual offer? Our team of experts is at your disposal. Please feel free to contact us.
contact.form_email_help: We only use your email to process your inquiry
contact.form_message_help: Describe your project or questions (at least 10 characters)
contact.form_privacy: I agree to the processing of my data according to the privacy policy
contact.form_newsletter: I would like to receive the newsletter with information about photovoltaics
contact.email_response: Response within the next 2 business days
contact.hours_note: Outside business hours, feel free to leave us a message. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.emergency_text: For urgent technical problems with your photovoltaic system, you can reach our 24/7 emergency service:
contact.emergency_note: Only for existing customers with a maintenance contract
contact.faq1_a: The planning phase usually takes 2-4 weeks, depending on the complexity of your project.
contact.faq2_q: How much does a photovoltaic system cost?
contact.faq2_a: The cost varies depending on the system size and complexity. For an individual cost estimate, please contact us.
contact.faq3_a: Construction and installation vary depending on the system size, ground/roof conditions, and overall complexity. We will gladly plan this with you.
contact.map_placeholder_text: An interactive map of our location would be displayed here.
contact.cta_subtitle: Let's plan your sustainable energy future together. Feel free to contact us.

cookie.title: Cookie Settings
cookie.description: We use cookies to improve your experience. Necessary cookies are required for basic functions. You can optionally allow analytics and marketing cookies.

modal.title: Cookie Settings
modal.intro: Choose which cookies you want to allow:

necessary.title: Necessary Cookies
necessary.desc: These cookies are required for the basic functions of the website and cannot be deactivated.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.desc: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.desc: These cookies are used to show you relevant advertising.
